title: HBM-NTM-high-edition
description: A port of the famous 1.7.10 warfare + technology mod HBM-NTM's Nuclear Tech to Minecraft 1.20.1 Forge. Currently, the mod development is still in its early stages and hasn't yet formed a complete survival system. Communication QQ Group: 929159255
body:
Mod Website: hbm-nova.brial.cn
GitHub Repository: https://github.com/Nteum/HBM-NTM-high-edition

【About the Porting Plan】

Currently, only porting to Forge 1.20.1 is planned.

Given the extensive content of the original mod, only selective porting will be carried out. Certain features, such as firearms, will be deprioritized as there are already mature alternative mods available for newer versions.

【Porting Progress & Near-Term Goals】

The immediate focus is on migrating machines and recipes.

The nuclear explosion functionality from HBM has already been implemented.

Due to the complexity of recipes and loot drops, machines are currently only testable in Creative Mode.

Radiation mechanics are also planned, but HBM's radiation system is highly intricate, and its migration requires further deliberation.

Discussion QQ Group: 929159255

- Chinese Edition Description: 
mod网站：hbm-nova.brial.cn
github仓库：https://github.com/Nteum/HBM-NTM-high-edition
【关于移植计划】
1. 目前仅考虑移植到forge版1.20.1
2. 考虑到原模组内容极为丰富，只能进行选择性移植，像枪械等高版本已经有成熟替代模组的方向暂不考虑。
【移植进度和近期目标】
1. 近期目标以迁移机器和配方为主。
2. 之前已经实现了hbm的核爆功能
3. 考虑到配方、凋落物的复杂性，目前只能在创造模式测试机器。
4. 辐射功能也在计划中，但hbm辐射体系颇为庞大，如何迁移还俟君子

交流群：929159255
